semantic.role: E2E test suite for the ArchSpine CLI, validating the built CLI binary against real filesystem operations and child processes.
responsibilities: Executes the built CLI binary (`dist/cli/index.js`) with various arguments via `spawnSync`.
Sets up temporary directories using `fs.mkdtempSync` for isolated test environments.
Invokes git commands (`execFileSync`) to simulate version control operations.
Writes prompts module wrapper scripts to control interactive input.
Collects stdout, stderr, and exit codes to assert correct CLI behavior.
Runs under the Vitest framework with `describe`, `it`, `beforeAll`, `afterEach`.
outOfScope: Unit testing individual CLI modules or internal functions.
Integration testing backend services or databases.
Testing non-CLI project components (e.g., HTTP handlers, MCP tools).
invariants: Must be executed by the Vitest test runner.
Must import the built CLI from `dist/cli/index.js` (built artifact).
Test file name must end with `.test.ts` or `.spec.ts` (rule compliance).
Must never be imported as a module; it is a standalone test suite.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide end-to-end coverage for CLI behavior using real process execution and temporary filesystems.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: This test file was involved in recent fixes addressing ESLint errors and prompt injection vulnerabilities (e.g., interacting with the `prompts` module).

English.role: End-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
responsibilities: Spawns the built CLI as a child process and verifies its output.
Creates temporary directories to isolate tests from real project state.
Runs git subprocesses for repository mocking.
Writes prompt wrappers to automate interactive CLI scenarios.
Asserts exit codes, stdout, and stderr match expected behavior.
outOfScope: Integration tests for server-side or database components.
